title: Unpackable Minecarts
description: Adds recipes to allow the uncrafting of all minecart types (excl. command block minecart).
body: # Unpackable Minecarts This pack adds recipes to allow the uncrafting of all minecart types (excl. command block minecart). Notice: Mod is in a dormant state. If things are broken, let me know, and I'll fix them when I can. Otherwise, this mod will not be actively updated or maintained. # Demonstration: **The video below is outdated, in the latest version you cannot uncraft command block minecarts.** https://youtu.be/8LZaT5Q9Ft0 **Basic GIF Demonstration:** ![Basic GIF Demonstration](https://cdn.driver.fyi/r/unpackable_demonstrations.gif) # Compatibility Unpackable Minecarts has compatibility/recipes for the following mods: - Create: Steam & Rails - Supplementaries # Support For support/suggestions, join my discord: [https://discord.gg/zKZsaXrmpV](https://discord.gg/zKZsaXrmpV) # Installation https://github.com/Itsyourdriver/unpackable-minecarts/wiki/Installation#installation ## Extras *Logo text was made in textstudio* Check out my other mods/datapacks here:
